cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about figuring out the date one week from the last day of 1899. So first, I need to know what the last day of 1899 is. Well, the last day of a year is December 31st. So December 31, 1899. Then, adding one week to that date. A week has seven days, so adding seven days to December 31, 1899. Let me think. If December 31 is day one, then adding one day would be January 1, 1900. But since it's a week, that's seven days. So December 31 + 7 days. Let me count them out. December has 31 days. So December 31 is the last day. Then the next day is January 1. Then January 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, and then January 7. So seven days after December 31 would be January 7, 1900. Because the first day after Dec 31 is Jan 1, so adding six more days gets you to Jan 7. So that would be 01/07/1900. Looking at the options, option D is 01/07/1900. So the answer should be D. Let me check if there's any other possible answer.
